name: French Style Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until foamy.
2. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar and beat until thickened.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
4. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the beaten egg whites.
5. Stir in the cream and remaining 3/4 cup sugar.
6. Transfer the mixture to a three-quart saucepan.
7. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until it coats a spoon (do not boil).
8. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
9. Allow the mixture to chill thoroughly before churning and freezing.
Makes 3 quarts.
